description_long: This cabin features a modern, minimalist rectangular design with a slightly sloped shed roof. The exterior is clad in vertical wooden paneling, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. Large, asymmetrically placed windows dominate one side, providing ample natural light and views into the interior, where simple furnishings such as chairs and a table are visible. The opposite side has smaller, more utilitarian windows and a single exterior door, suggesting a functional layout. The roof is unadorned except for a small chimney or vent, and there is no visible porch or overhang. The overall aesthetic is clean and understated, with a focus on geometric lines and practical use of space.
description: A modern, rectangular cabin with vertical wood paneling, large asymmetrical windows, and a sloped shed roof. The design is minimalist, with simple furnishings visible inside and no porch.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the cabin shows a large window revealing interior chairs and a table, with the sloped roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: The long side features two large windows, one of which is floor-to-ceiling, and a small exterior door near the right edge.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end displays a single wide window and the continuation of the sloped roof, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: The rear long side has two smaller windows and the main exterior door, with some interior furniture visible through the glass.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, clad in the same material as the walls, featuring a small chimney or vent
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with two large rectangular windows on one long side, a single wide window on one short end, and two smaller windows on the opposite long side; windows vary in size and placement, creating a modern, irregular pattern
attribute_door_placement: one exterior door located on the long side with smaller windows, positioned near the short end; no other doors visible
